meta.title: NEW AI Filmmaking Tool Creates Cinematic AI videos
meta.description:
How To Create Professional Cinematic AI images & Videos using Higgsfield
Try Cinema Studio 👉  https://higgsfield.ai?fpr=dankieft

In this video I show you how to use higgsfield Cinema studio. This new feature let's you become an AI director which helps you generate your own AI Films.

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts & chat about AI

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
